Headline: #60 Blue Island/26th Temporary Reroute at Racine/Roosevelt
ShortDescription: #60 Blue Island/26th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Racine, Taylor, Ashland and Blue Island, due to police activity nr Racine/Roosevelt.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#60 Blue Island/26th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Racine, Taylor, Ashland, Blue Island, then resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to police activity near Racine/Roosevelt.

Headline: #12 Roosevelt Temporary Reroute at Roosevelt/Racine
ShortDescription: #12 Roosevelt buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Roosevelt, Ashland, Taylor and Roosevelt due to police activity near Roosevelt/Racine.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#12 Roosevelt buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Roosevelt, Ashland, Taylor, then resume their normal route on Roosevelt.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to police activity near Roosevelt/Racine.

Headline: #55 Garfield Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Garfield/Oakley
ShortDescription: Eastbound 55 Garfield buses are temporarily rerouted via 55th, Western, 59th, Damen and 55th: due to, street blockage near Garfield/Oakley.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #55 Garfield buses are temporarily rerouted via 55th, Western, 59th, Damen and 55th: due to, street blockage near Garfield/Oakley.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
